subject: Add variable to disable filebeat globally
commit_message:
Add variable to disable filebeat globally

As filebeat is deprecated flag to disable it globally is added.

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: Maciej Wereski <m.wereski@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: Ia57be73f393d4359c2dbc89dca20604e5f60f9df
